description: Travel blogger based in Chengdu. Photographer, hiker, and food explorer.

voice_lines.family: 我现在离家比较远，但和家人感情很好。
voice_lines.work: 我是旅行博主，经常出去拍照写文章。
voice_lines.hobby: 我喜欢拍照和探索新地方。
voice_lines.travel: 旅行是我的工作，也是我的爱好！
voice_lines.place: 我老家是成都，那里是我最爱的城市之一。
voice_lines.food: 我最喜欢尝试各地的特色小吃。

discoverable_facts.identity: 晓云这个名字有点特别，是我外婆取的，她说云朵代表自由，希望我将来无拘无束。
discoverable_facts.family: 我爸妈都在成都，我是独生女，每隔两三个月回去看他们，每次回去他们都帮我做好多好吃的。
discoverable_facts.family_size: 我家就三口人，我、爸爸、妈妈。
discoverable_facts.family_siblings: 我是独生女，没有兄弟姐妹。
discoverable_facts.family_live: 我在外面工作，不和家人住在一起，但每隔两三个月回成都看看他们。
discoverable_facts.work: 我做旅行博主已经三年了，现在在小红书上有大概十万粉丝，主要分享云南和西藏的旅行。
discoverable_facts.hobby: 我的相机是我最重要的东西，走到哪里都带着，已经拍了大概两万张照片了。
discoverable_facts.travel: 我去过西藏、新疆、云南还有几个东南亚国家，最难忘的是在西藏看星星那一晚。
discoverable_facts.place: 成都的节奏不算快，大家都很悠闲，茶馆文化特别有趣，我很喜欢在茶馆坐一下午。
discoverable_facts.food: 我觉得云南的菜最有特色，过桥米线、汽锅鸡，每次去都要吃个够。
discoverable_facts.work_company: 我主要在小红书上发内容，也在其他平台分享，没有固定公司，是自由职业。
discoverable_facts.work_origin: 大学学的是新闻，但毕业后觉得旅行摄影更自由，慢慢就开始做博主了。
discoverable_facts.hobby_best: 最喜欢的是拍到一张构图刚刚好的照片，那种感觉很难形容，就是对了！
discoverable_facts.hobby_origin: 高中开始用手机拍照，后来买了第一台相机，越拍越觉得有意思，就一直坚持下来了。
discoverable_facts.travel_with: 拍照的时候喜欢一个人去，比较自由，但长途旅行的话有时候会叫朋友一起。

discoverable_facts_simple_en.travel: I've been to Tibet and Yunnan.

discoverable_facts_en.identity: The name Xiaoyun is a little special.
discoverable_facts_en.family: My parents are in Chengdu and I'm an only child.
discoverable_facts_en.family_size: Just three of us — me and my parents.
discoverable_facts_en.family_siblings: I'm an only child — no siblings.
discoverable_facts_en.family_live: I work away from home, but I go back to Chengdu to see my parents every couple of months.
discoverable_facts_en.work: I've been a travel blogger for three years.
discoverable_facts_en.work_company: I mainly post on Xiaohongshu and share on other platforms too — I'm freelance, no fixed company.
discoverable_facts_en.work_origin: I studied journalism but found travel photography more freeing after graduating.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby: My camera is my most important possession.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_best: That moment when the composition is just right — hard to describe, it just clicks.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_origin: I started with a phone camera in high school, then got my first proper camera — the more I shot the more hooked I got.
discoverable_facts_en.travel_with: For photography I prefer going alone — more freedom. For long trips I sometimes bring friends.
discoverable_facts_en.food: I think Yunnan cuisine is the most distinctive.

voice_lines_en.family: I'm far from home but very close to my family.
voice_lines_en.work: I'm a travel blogger — I often go out to take photos and write.
voice_lines_en.hobby: I love photography and exploring new places.
voice_lines_en.travel: Travel is my work AND my hobby!
voice_lines_en.place: My hometown is Chengdu — one of my favourite cities.
voice_lines_en.food: I love trying local street food from different places.
